channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-21T21:04Z — 1514 outages, 60,181 customers, 337 fair-weather, 20 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-DUKE: 2937 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1749 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NC-DEC: 1456 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VAWV-APCO: 1399 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
